groups.name: ENHYPEN
groups.about: ENHYPEN (엔하이픈) is a 7-member South Korean boy group under BE:LIFT Lab, a subsidiary label under HYBE. The group consists of the final members of the survival show I-LAND; Jungwon, Heeseung, Jay, Jake, Sunghoon, Sunoo, and Ni-ki. They debuted on November 30, 2020, with their first mini album, BORDER: DAY ONE. The group made their Japanese debut on July 6, 2021.
groups.description: You’re someone who’s curious about the world and the journey of growing up. Like Enhypen, you’re drawn to mystery, stories, and the connections that shape who we are. You value emotional depth, enjoy exploring new perspectives, and are fascinated by adventures that challenge and inspire you. Life feels like a story, and you love being part of the chapters that make it meaningful.

groups.name: TOMORROW X TOGETHER
groups.about: TXT (투모로우바이투게더), also known as TOMORROW X TOGETHER, is a 5-member boy group formed by BIGHIT MUSIC (part of HYBE LABELS), consisting of Soobin, Yeonjun, Beomgyu, Taehyun, and Hueningkai. They debuted on March 4, 2019, with their first mini album, The Dream Chapter: STAR. There are no set positions within the group, it changes each comeback/release/song.
groups.description: You’re someone who lives between reality and dreams. You care deeply about your friendships and the journey you’re on, even when things feel confusing or overwhelming. Like TXT’s stories, your life is about growing, discovering who you are, and learning that it’s okay to change along the way. You balance softness with strength, and even when the world feels uncertain, you hold onto the people and dreams that matter most to you.

groups.name: Stray Kids
groups.about: Stray Kids (스트레이 키즈) is a 8-member South Korean boy group under JYP Entertainment, consisting of Bang Chan, Lee Know, Changbin, Hyunjin, Han, Felix, Seungmin, and I.N. They debuted as a 9-member group on March 25, 2018, with their first mini album, I am NOT. The group was created through the survival program with the same name, Stray Kids.
groups.description: You match the energy of Stray Kids — bold, emotional, and unafraid to stand out. You don’t believe in pretending to be someone you’re not, even when it would be easier to fit in. Like their music, you’re driven by honesty and self-expression, and you’re constantly growing through the challenges you face. You understand that strength isn’t about being perfect — it’s about staying true to yourself, even during chaos.

groups.name: ILLIT
groups.about: ILLIT (아일릿) is a 5-member South Korean girl group under BE:LIFT Lab, consisting of Yunah, Minju, Moka, Wonhee, and Iroha. They debuted on March 25, 2024, with their first mini album, SUPER REAL ME. They made their Japanese debut on September 1, 2025, with the single, “Toki Yo Tomare”.
groups.description: You match the essence of ILLIT — soft but strong in your own way. You value sincerity, connection, and the beauty of small moments. Like their dreamy concept, you find meaning in emotions and experiences rather than loud statements. You move through life gently but intentionally, growing while staying true to yourself.

groups.name: CORTIS
groups.about: CORTIS (코르티스), formerly known as BIGHITNBG (BIGHIT New Boy Group), is a 5-member South Korean boy group under BIGHIT MUSIC. The members are Martin, James, Juhoon, Seonghyeon, and Keonho. In the USA, they’re represented by Republic Records.
groups.description: You’re someone who refuses to live inside the lines others draw for you. You value authenticity over perfection and creativity over conformity, choosing to express yourself in ways that feel real rather than expected. Like CORTIS, you thrive when you’re allowed to experiment, grow, and shape your own path instead of following trends.

members.name: Jungwon
members.about: Yang Jung‑won, born on February 9, 2004, is the leader of ENHYPEN, known for his calm leadership, strong stage presence, and dedication to connecting with fans. He ranked 1st in the survival show I‑LAND and became leader despite being one of the youngest members.
members.description: You’re someone who’s steadfast, thoughtful, and dependable—just like Jungwon. You value your commitments and aren’t afraid to step up when responsibility calls. You care deeply for the people close to you, often anticipating what others need before they say it. Whether it’s keeping your word, supporting your friends, or facing challenges head‑on, you put in effort with sincerity and heart. Fans and friends alike admire your grounded presence and the way you make connections feel meaningful and genuine.

members.name: Heeseung
members.about: Lee Hee‑seung, born on October 15, 2001, is the eldest member of ENHYPEN. He’s known for his smooth vocals, musicality, and thoughtful approach to music creation — even producing songs like "Highway 1009."
members.description: You’re a steady, creative soul who brings calm confidence into everything you do — much like Heeseung. You think before you act, have a deep well of talent, and bring out the best in others with your supportive presence. When life gets chaotic, you naturally ground yourself and your friends with humor, wisdom, and unwavering effort.

members.name: Jay
members.about: Park Jong‑seong, born on April 20, 2002, is the multinational member of ENHYPEN who brings charisma, confidence, and musical versatility to the group. He trained for nearly three years under Big Hit before debuting.
members.description: You’re a free‑spirited go‑getter who shines in bold moments and inspires others with your confidence. Like Jay, you’re not afraid to try new things, express yourself creatively, and make people around you feel included and energized. You live with passion — and that’s infectious.

members.name: Jake
members.about: Sim Jae‑yoon, born on November 15, 2002, is the “Icon of Growth” for how dramatically he improved in a short time before debut. He’s known for his positive energy, smile, sports skills, and contributions to lyrics & composition.
members.description: You’re the optimistic engine in your group — full of encouragement, heart, and the belief that growth is everything. Like Jake, you light up rooms with your smile, keep trying new things, and make others feel supported and heard. Your energy is the kind that lifts people up.

members.name: Sunghoon
members.about: Park Sung‑hoon, born on December 8, 2002, is a former competitive figure skater who brings precision, discipline, and controlled stage presence to ENHYPEN. He trained in skating for around 10 years before debuting.
members.description: You’re someone who moves through life with precision and grace, much like Sunghoon. You value discipline, take your goals seriously, and carry yourself with quiet confidence. Others admire your steady strength and the way you handle challenges with poise and focus.

members.name: Sunoo
members.about: Kim Sun-woo, born on June 24, 2003, is known for his expressive stage presence, quick song memorization, and charming personality. He loves K‑dramas, horror movies with Ni‑ki, and often posts selfies on social media.
members.description: You’re someone who lights up the room with your enthusiasm and warmth — just like Sunoo. You connect easily with others, enjoy expressing yourself, and bring people together with your vibrant energy. Life feels richer when shared, and you make that clear with every smile.

members.name: Ni-ki
members.about: Nishimura Riki, born on December 9, 2005, s the maknae (youngest) and a dance powerhouse, known for his charismatic performances and playful energy off stage. He brings intensity and dedication to every practice.
members.description: You’re someone who lives with passion, playfulness, and purpose. Like Ni‑ki, you take on challenges boldly, work tirelessly to perfect your skills, and bring excitement wherever you go. You balance intensity with warmth, making you unforgettable both on and off the stage.

members.name: Soobin
members.about: Choi Soo-bin, born on December 5, 2000, is the leader of TXT known for his calm presence and gentle leadership. He is soft-spoken but emotionally strong and deeply cares for the members.
members.description: You are someone people naturally feel safe around. You may not always be loud or attention-seeking, but your quiet strength keeps others grounded. You value harmony and often put others before yourself, acting as the emotional support in your circle. Your kindness and responsibility make you a natural leader — even if you don’t always realize it.

members.name: Yeonjun
members.about: Choi Yeon-jun, born on September 13, 1999, is the charismatic all-rounder of TXT with strong confidence and expressive personality.
members.description: You are bold and unapologetically yourself. You thrive when expressing your individuality and love pushing boundaries creatively. Your passion drives you to improve and stand out, and while you enjoy attention, it comes from a genuine love for what you do. You inspire others simply by being fearless in who you are.

members.name: Beomgyu
members.about: Choi Beom-gyu, born on September 13, 1999, is the playful mood-maker with a soft emotional core and artistic sensitivity.
members.description: You're someone who brightens any space you enter. You balance humor with emotional depth, often using creativity or laughter to connect with others. You may hide your softer side behind jokes, but your warmth and sincerity make people feel understood and comforted.

members.name: Taehyun
members.about: Kang Tae-hyun, born on February 5, 2002, is Sharp-minded and dependable, and is known for his honesty and strong sense of self.
members.description: You're someone who sees the world clearly and isn’t afraid to face reality. You rely on logic and truth rather than illusions, and people trust your judgment. Your independence and determination help you stay steady even in chaos, making you someone others turn to when they need clarity.

members.name: Heuningkai
members.about: Kai Kamal Heuning, born on August 14, 2002, is the bright, lovable youngest member known for his curiosity and positive spirit.
members.description: You are someone who brings light wherever you go. Your curiosity keeps you open to new experiences, and your natural kindness makes people feel welcome. You approach life with wonder and sincerity, reminding others that joy can exist even in difficult moments.

members.name: Bang Chan
members.about: Christopher Chahn Bahng, born on October 3, 1997, in Korea but raised in Australia, is the leader and main producer of Stray Kids. He’s deeply involved in writing and creating the group’s music and is known for supporting the members both creatively and emotionally.
members.description: You’re someone who leads with care, strength, and responsibility. Like Bang Chan, you naturally support the people around you and work hard to keep everything running smoothly. You balance ambition with compassion, always striving to succeed while making sure no one is left behind. Your presence brings stability and reassurance, making others feel safe and motivated.

members.name: Lee Know
members.about: Lee Min-ho, born on October 25, 1998, was originally a professional dancer. He is known for his sharp skills and quirky personality. He’s both playful and unexpectedly thoughtful, with a calm but mischievous presence.
members.description: You’re someone who values independence and quiet authenticity. Like Lee Know, you may not always seek attention, but your individuality makes you unforgettable. You move through life in your own way, balancing humor with practicality. Your calm confidence allows you to stand out effortlessly while staying true to yourself.

members.name: Changbin
members.about: Seo Chang-bin, born on August 11, 1999, is a powerful rapper and one of the main producers in Stray Kids. He’s known for his intense stage presence but also his emotional honesty and loyalty to the group.
members.description: You’re someone driven by passion and emotional honesty. Like Changbin, you face challenges with intensity and determination, refusing to give up on what matters to you. You protect your goals and the people you care about fiercely. Your strength lies in your sincerity — you give everything your full heart.

members.name: Hyunjin
members.about: Hwang Hyun-jin, born on March 20, 2000, is known for his artistic side — whether through dance, painting, or performance. He combines elegance with emotion and often expresses himself through creativity.
members.description: You’re someone who lives through creativity and emotion. Like Hyunjin, you express yourself in meaningful ways and see beauty where others might not. You balance sensitivity with ambition, allowing your feelings to guide your growth. Your artistic mindset makes your journey deeply personal and impactful.

members.name: Han
members.about: Han Ji-sung, born on September 14, 2000, is a rapper, vocalist, and songwriter known for his versatility and introspective nature. Behind his humor is someone deeply thoughtful.
members.description: You’re someone who balances humor with depth. Like Han, you adapt quickly and use creativity to navigate life’s ups and downs. You may appear carefree, but your thoughts run deep, and your ability to reflect helps you grow. Your energy is both playful and thoughtful.

members.name: Felix
members.about: Lee Yong-bok, born on September 15, 2000, in Australia. He is known for his deep voice and warm personality. He brings softness and positivity to the group.
members.description: You’re someone who leads with kindness and warmth. Like Felix, your presence naturally comforts others and brings positivity into any space. You believe in lifting people up and spreading genuine support. Your strength lies in your gentle sincerity.

members.name: Seungmin
members.about: Kim Seung-min, born on September 22, 2000, is known for his stability and reliability. He has a grounded personality and strong work ethic.
members.description: You’re someone grounded and dependable. Like Seungmin, you approach life with calm logic and honesty. You stay steady even during uncertainty, helping others feel secure. Your consistency and reliability make you someone people trust deeply.

members.name: I.N.
members.about: Yang Jeong-in, born on February 8, 2001, the youngest member, has grown into a confident and warm presence. He’s known for his sincerity and quiet determination.
members.description: You’re someone constantly growing and discovering your potential. Like I.N, you balance softness with quiet determination. You face life with sincerity and optimism, becoming stronger through experience. Your journey is defined by steady progress and heartfelt effort.

members.name: Yunah
members.about: Noh Yunah, born on January 15, 2004, is the charismatic and dependable member of ILLIT. Known for her confidence and expressive stage presence, she balances elegance with playful charm.
members.description: You’re someone who moves through life with confidence and natural charm. Like Yunah, you’re not afraid to take the spotlight when needed, but you also know how to lift others up around you. You combine elegance with a playful spirit, making your presence both strong and refreshing. Your ability to balance confidence with warmth makes people feel inspired and supported.

members.name: Minju
members.about: Park Minju, born on May 11, 2004, is calm, thoughtful, and emotionally grounded. She brings stability to the group with her warm personality and artistic sensitivity.
members.description: You’re someone who brings quiet comfort and emotional depth wherever you go. Like Minju, you lead with kindness and thoughtfulness, creating a calm space for others. Your creativity and sensitivity allow you to connect with people on a deeper level, while your steady nature helps you stay grounded even during uncertainty.

members.name: Moka
members.about: Sakai Moka, born on October 8, 2004, has a dreamy yet mischievous charm. She mixes sweetness with a subtle boldness that makes her unpredictable and fun.
members.description: You’re someone who blends sweetness with unexpected boldness. Like Moka, you have a dreamy side but also a playful spark that keeps life exciting. You adapt easily and bring light energy into any situation, often surprising others with your confidence and curiosity. Your charm comes from being both gentle and adventurous.

members.name: Wonhee
members.about: Lee Wonhee, born on June 26, 2007, radiates innocence and optimism. Her sincerity and emotional openness make her naturally lovable.
members.description: You’re someone who carries sincerity and optimism at your core. Like Wonhee, your genuine emotions and warm personality make people feel safe around you. You embrace life with softness and honesty, reminding others to appreciate simple joys. Your openness allows you to grow while staying true to yourself.

members.name: Iroha
members.about: Hokazono Iroha, born on February 4, 2008, is energetic and quietly determined. She combines youthful charm with strong ambition and precision.
members.description: You’re someone who quietly pushes forward with determination and heart. Like Iroha, you combine youthful energy with strong ambition, always striving to improve. You may appear gentle at first, but your passion drives you to pursue your goals fully. Your strength lies in balancing grace with persistence.

members.name: Martin
members.about: Martin Edwards Park, born on March 20, 2008, is the leader and creative core of CORTIS, Martin is deeply involved in songwriting, producing, and concept creation. Before debut, he even contributed to songs for other HYBE artists — proving his artistic mind early on.
members.description: You’re someone who leads with creativity and heart. Like Martin, you thrive when you can shape something meaningful from your own ideas. You naturally inspire others, not through control, but through passion and belief. Your energy uplifts people around you, and your imagination helps you turn dreams into reality.

members.name: James
members.about: Zhao Yufan, born on October 14, 2005, is the oldest member, James brings global charm and versatility to the group. Raised internationally and fluent in multiple languages, he adds both artistic skill and worldly perspective to CORTIS.
members.description: You move through life with quiet confidence and intelligence. Like James, you balance logic with creativity, always finding your own way rather than following the crowd. You have a cool presence that draws people in, and your ability to adapt makes you someone others naturally admire.

members.name: Juhoon
members.about: Kim Ju-hoon, born on January 3, 2008, is known for his expressive vocals and emotional delivery, Juhoon brings depth to CORTIS’s performances with his sincere style.
members.description: You feel deeply and express yourself honestly. Like Juhoon, you connect with others through sincerity and emotion. You don’t hide who you are — instead, you embrace your sensitivity as a strength. Your warmth and empathy make people feel understood and safe around you.

members.name: Seonghyeon
members.about: Eom Seong-hyeon, born on January 13, 2009, is known for his bright stage presence and ability to energize both the group and the audience during performances.
members.description: You light up every space you enter. Like Seonghyeon, your energy naturally lifts the mood of those around you. You enjoy connecting with others and expressing yourself freely. Your positivity is contagious, and your presence makes people feel alive and included.

members.name: Keonho
members.about: Ahn Geon-ho, born on February 14, 2009, is the youngest member and is known for his striking visuals and natural charisma. Before debut, he trained as a competitive swimmer, bringing discipline and determination into his idol career.
members.description: You grow stronger through challenges. Like Keonho, you balance charm with resilience, always striving to improve yourself. Your quiet determination helps you move forward even when things feel uncertain. People admire your ability to stay focused while still keeping your natural warmth.

albums.title: THE SIN: VANISH
albums.description: You’re someone who understands that growth often comes from facing your darker sides. Like The Sin: Vanish, you’re drawn to transformation, emotional depth, and the quiet battles that shape who we become. You know temptation, struggle, and change are part of life — but instead of running from them, you confront them. There’s a powerful intensity to you, balanced by self-awareness and the desire to evolve into something stronger.

albums.title: ROMANCE: UNTOLD
albums.description: You believe love is powerful — even when it’s uncertain or complicated. Like Romance: Untold, you’re drawn to deep emotions, unspoken feelings, and the courage it takes to open your heart. You may not always say everything out loud, but your connections run strong and sincere. To you, love isn’t just about perfection — it’s about honesty, vulnerability, and choosing someone despite the unknown.

albums.title: ORANGE BLOOD
albums.description: You love deeply and don’t hold back when something truly matters to you. Like Orange Blood, your emotions are strong, sincere, and rooted in devotion. You value meaningful bonds and are willing to give your energy and heart to the people you care about. Passion drives your choices, and once you commit, you stay loyal through every challenge.

albums.title: DESIRE: UNLEASH
albums.description: You feel things deeply and aren’t afraid of intensity. Like DESIRE : UNLEASH, you follow your heart even when emotions become overwhelming. You crave meaningful experiences and connections that feel alive and real. Your passion drives you forward — sometimes impulsively — but always with sincerity.

albums.title: DIMENSION: DILEMMA
albums.description: You’re someone navigating choices and learning from every step along the way. Like DIMENSION : DILEMMA, you understand that growing up means facing uncertainty and making difficult decisions. You question, reflect, and evolve — always trying to find the path that feels true to you.

albums.title: The Star Chapter: TOGETHER
albums.description: You find strength in togetherness and believe that growth doesn’t have to happen alone. Like The Star Chapter: TOGETHER, your journey is about healing through connection — leaning on others while also learning to stand confidently as yourself. You value meaningful bonds and believe shared experiences shape who you become. Even during uncertainty, you move forward with hope and trust in the people beside you.

albums.title: The Name Chapter: FREEFALL
albums.description: You’re someone who eventually chooses reality over illusion, even when it’s painful. Like FREEFALL, your story is about stepping out of avoidance and confronting life head-on. Growth isn’t easy — but you know that true progress comes from honesty and resilience. You don’t run forever — you face what scares you and move forward stronger.

albums.title: The Star Chapter: SANCTUARY
albums.description: You see love as a safe place — something that gives meaning and grounding. Like SANCTUARY, your world revolves around meaningful emotional connections that help you stop running and start truly living. You cherish deep bonds and believe that the right person can feel like home. For you, love is not weakness — it’s strength and protection.

albums.title: The Name Chapter: TEMPTATION
albums.description: You often wish time would slow down. Like TEMPTATION, you’re drawn to freedom and the idea of staying in a world untouched by responsibility. You enjoy wonder, imagination, and moments where life feels magical and limitless. But deep down, this longing reflects your fear of losing innocence — and your desire to hold onto joy just a little longer.

albums.title: Minisode 3: TOMORROW
albums.description: You are someone who keeps moving — even when the future feels unclear. Like TOMORROW, your story is about believing in what comes next, even after doubt or struggle. You may feel lost sometimes, but you never fully lose hope. You trust that better days are ahead and that every ending is simply a step toward a new beginning.

albums.title: KARMA
albums.description: You believe actions shape destiny. You’re introspective and aware of the deeper meaning behind choices. Your presence is intense — you change situations simply by being part of them.

albums.title: HOP
albums.description: You live freely and express yourself without fear. You bring energy wherever you go and inspire others to break out of their comfort zones. Your vibe is fresh, unpredictable, and fun.

albums.title: ATE
albums.concept: Consumption of ambition, hunger for success
albums.description: You’re fueled by ambition and always chasing your next goal. You thrive on challenges and enjoy pushing boundaries. You don’t just dream — you devour opportunities.

albums.title: IN LIFE
albums.description: You feel things deeply and aren't afraid to confront life’s messiness. You grow through challenges and learn from emotional highs and lows. You're resilient — even when life gets overwhelming, you keep moving forward.

albums.title: 5-STAR
albums.description: You radiate confidence and aren't afraid to stand out. You trust your own path and aim high, even when others doubt you. Your energy is powerful and inspiring — you're someone who knows their worth and refuses to dim their light.
